front: Order of MonoBehaviour callbacks (load → first frame)?
back: Awake → OnEnable → Start → Update

front: When does Awake run?
back: Once when GameObject loads, before any Start

front: When does Start run?
back: Once before the first Update, after all Awakes

front: What runs at the physics tick rate?
back: FixedUpdate

front: What runs after all Updates?
back: LateUpdate (use for camera follow)

front: What's [SerializeField] for?
back: Exposes private fields to the Inspector

front: Why prefer [SerializeField] private over public?
back: Encapsulation: serialized to editor without leaking access to other scripts

front: How to make a GameObject a Prefab?
back: Drag from Hierarchy into Project window

front: Difference between Prefab Variant and nested Prefab?
back: Variant inherits from base prefab; nested is a prefab inside another scene/prefab

front: What is a ScriptableObject?
back: A Unity asset class — for shared data, not GameObjects

front: Why prefer SO event channels over singletons?
back: Decoupling — neither side needs a reference to the other

front: Multiply movement by what for frame-rate independence?
back: Time.deltaTime

front: Multiply velocity by what in FixedUpdate?
back: Time.fixedDeltaTime (or just use velocity directly with Rigidbody)

front: What's IObjectPool<T> for?
back: Pooling spawned objects (bullets, enemies) to avoid Instantiate/Destroy GC

front: When to use FixedUpdate vs Update?
back: FixedUpdate for physics (Rigidbody); Update for input + game logic

front: What does [RequireComponent(typeof(Rigidbody))] do?
back: Auto-adds Rigidbody when this script is added; prevents removal while script is on

front: What is Pattern Day Trader rule (US)? (relevance: trading)
back: ≥4 day trades in 5 business days flags PDT in margin accts; needs $25k minimum

front: How to load a scene by name?
back: SceneManager.LoadScene(\SceneName\")"

front: Default render pipeline for new Unity 6 LTS 3D projects?
back: URP (Universal Render Pipeline)

front: What does Apply Root Motion control?
back: Whether the Animator moves the GameObject (vs script-driven movement)

front: How to set up an Animator parameter from script?
back: animator.SetFloat / SetBool / SetTrigger

front: How to call a method when a 2D area is entered (with rigidbody)?
back: OnTriggerEnter2D, both colliders set; one trigger, one with rigidbody

front: Path used for cross-platform persistent saves?
back: Application.persistentDataPath

front: Format-correct: a JsonUtility-serializable class needs?
back: [System.Serializable] on the class; public fields or [SerializeField]

front: Modern UI system in Unity 6?
back: UI Toolkit (UXML/USS); uGUI (Canvas) is legacy but still used

front: What's an OCO order?
back: One-cancels-other; placing a stop and target where filling one cancels the other

front: Common reason OnTriggerEnter doesn't fire?
back: Neither object has Rigidbody, or no collider is set Trigger

front: Why is Update vs FixedUpdate movement choice important?
back: FixedUpdate for Rigidbody movement (smooth physics interp); Update for direct transform
